Save UX & entry points.question: Where should Save / Load live in the UI?
Save behavior — explicit, automatic, or hybrid?
How does the user load a saved project?
Save UX & entry points.answer: Open button + drag-drop the project file onto DropZone

Save UX & entry points.question: When does the app prompt to save unsaved changes?
Save UX & entry points.answer: Prompt on app close + on new-skeleton-drop

State scope.question: Extra state beyond F9.1 essentials
State scope.answer: Last-used outDir + sort column/direction. Documentation builder is a future feature — reserve schema slot.

State scope.question: Persist samplingHz now (Phase 9 owns Settings UI)
State scope.answer: Yes — nullable field, default 120 if absent

State scope.question: Collapse / search / scroll / focus / selection state

deferred_ideas: Documentation builder feature: tracklists, mix time, skin descriptions, authoring UI. Phase 8 reserves top-level `documentation: {}` slot in project file so this phase ships without re-touching the v1 schema.
Window size / position persistence (app-global, not per-project) — Phase 9.
Active tab / collapse state / search query / scroll position / focus / selection persistence — Phase 9 polish.
Hybrid auto-save scratch file for crash recovery — Phase 9 if requested.
